insight: CitizensHook.findRegistry() can throw NoClassDefFoundError (not just IllegalStateException) when Citizens is detected by HookManager.isCitizensLoaded() but its classes aren't actually available at runtime (e.g., removed after detection, or class loading issues on alpha Paper builds). Also, CitizensHook.update(Boss, Entity) previously didn't null-check findRegistry() unlike all other callers, which could cause NPE in the same scenario. Both were fixed in #1498.
